reviews.comment:
una YPF de las del automovil club ACA, ideal para hacer escala regresando de la costa.  buen cafe, hay un restó parrilla escondido y mucho estacionamiento a la sombra de añosos eucaliptos.

(Translated by Google)
A YPF station belonging to the ACA automobile club, ideal for a stopover on the way back from the coast. Good coffee, a hidden grill restaurant, and plenty of parking in the shade of old eucalyptus trees.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoOWMybTZBRRAB
